title: Run verification suite and confirm coverage >= 90%
summary: Execute the verification suite and confirm test coverage meets or exceeds 90%, documenting results and any required follow-ups.
acceptance_criteria: Any failures or coverage regressions are captured with next steps.

steps.description: Run the project's verification suite according to .rules.
Check coverage output and confirm it is >= 90%.
Record results and note any remediation tasks if needed.

notes: Use the standard verification workflow for this repository.
Keep log outputs summarized; prefer coverage percentages over full logs.
